questions.question: Explain the concept of Virtual Memory and its relationship with Physical Memory (RAM) in a typical computer system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the virtual memory management hierarchy and its interaction with physical memory.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a Page Table in Virtual Memory Management? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain how page tables map virtual addresses to physical addresses.

questions.question: Describe the advantages and disadvantages of using a Fixed Page Size in Virtual Memory Management. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the impact of varying page sizes on performance, memory utilization, and cache efficiency.
